message:
Agent chat: replace use-stick-to-bottom with manual scroll anchoring

Drop the use-stick-to-bottom dependency in favor of a two-mode scroll
system: auto-scroll (pinned to bottom during initial load and streaming)
and anchor mode (viewport-stable after user interaction). A ResizeObserver
that fires before paint either scrolls to the bottom or restores the
saved anchor node position, so collapsible expand/collapse, async diff
highlighting, and streaming all work without flicker in every browser.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/m6idhz6ct74cxupt1o4t32mv
